visual: Bow stance with a sharp forward thrust of an open hand, fingers extended like a spear, as the rear hand withdraws.
motion_description: The practitioner performs a rapid, continuous sequence of alternating hopping kicks. With each jump, the lifting leg sweeps inward across the center line, bending outward at the knee to expose the inner sole of the foot. At the peak of the hop, the same-side hand executes a sharp, downward open-palm slap against the raised foot, while the opposite arm folds across the chest to guard near the elbow. The torso twists slightly toward the active leg upon impact before the body repeatedly lands back into a parallel stance to spring into the next side.
